On this page

data-structure-typed

data-structure-typed / TreeMultiMap

Class: TreeMultiMap<K, V, R> ‚Äã

Defined in: data-structures/binary-tree/tree-multi-map.ts:28

TreeMultiMap (ordered MultiMap) ‚Äî key ‚Üí bucket (Array of values).

Semantics (RFC):

  • Bucketed design: each key appears once; duplicates live in the bucket.
  • get(key) returns a live bucket reference.
  • Default iteration yields bucket entries: [K, V[]].
  • Navigable operations (first/last/ceiling/...) return entry tuples like TreeMap.

Example ‚Äã

ts
// Morris traversal (O(1) space)
 const tmm = new TreeMultiMap<number>([5, 3, 7]);
    const result = tmm.morris(n => n.key, 'IN');
    console.log(result.length); // > 0;

Type Parameters ‚Äã

K ‚Äã

K = any

V ‚Äã

V = any

R ‚Äã

R = any

Implements ‚Äã

  • Iterable<[K, V[]]>

Constructors ‚Äã

Constructor ‚Äã

ts
new TreeMultiMap<K, V, R>(keysNodesEntriesOrRaws?, options?): TreeMultiMap<K, V, R>;

Defined in: data-structures/binary-tree/tree-multi-map.ts:45

Creates a new TreeMultiMap.

Parameters ‚Äã

keysNodesEntriesOrRaws? ‚Äã

Iterable< | K | R | [K | null | undefined, V[] | undefined] | null | undefined> = []

Initial entries, or raw elements if toEntryFn is provided.

options? ‚Äã

TreeMultiMapOptions<K, V[], R> = {}

Configuration options including optional toEntryFn to transform raw elements.

Returns ‚Äã

TreeMultiMap<K, V, R>

Remarks ‚Äã

Time O(m log m), Space O(m) where m is the number of initial entries

Example ‚Äã

ts
// Standard usage with entries
const mmap = new TreeMultiMap([['a', ['x', 'y']], ['b', ['z']]]);

// Using toEntryFn to transform raw objects
const players = [{ score: 100, items: ['sword'] }, { score: 200, items: ['shield', 'bow'] }];
const mmap = new TreeMultiMap(players, { toEntryFn: p => [p.score, p.items] });

Accessors ‚Äã

comparator ‚Äã

Get Signature ‚Äã

ts
get comparator(): Comparator<K>;

Defined in: data-structures/binary-tree/tree-multi-map.ts:3152

Expose comparator for advanced usage/testing (read-only).

Remarks ‚Äã

Time O(1), Space O(1)

Returns ‚Äã

Comparator<K>

size ‚Äã

Get Signature ‚Äã

ts
get size(): number;

Defined in: data-structures/binary-tree/tree-multi-map.ts:109

Number of distinct keys.

Remarks ‚Äã

Time O(1), Space O(1)

Returns ‚Äã

number

totalSize ‚Äã

Get Signature ‚Äã

ts
get totalSize(): number;

Defined in: data-structures/binary-tree/tree-multi-map.ts:400

Total number of values across all buckets (Œ£ bucket.length).

Remarks ‚Äã

Time O(n), Space O(1)

Example ‚Äã
ts
const mm = new TreeMultiMap<number, string>();
      mm.add(1, 'a');
      mm.add(1, 'b');
      mm.add(2, 'c');
console.log(mm.totalSize); // 3
Returns ‚Äã

number

Methods ‚Äã

[iterator]() ‚Äã

ts
iterator: Iterator<[K, V[]]>;

Defined in: data-structures/binary-tree/tree-multi-map.ts:1237

Iterates over all entries as [key, bucket] pairs.

Returns ‚Äã

Iterator<[K, V[]]>

Remarks ‚Äã

Time O(n), Space O(1)

Implementation of ‚Äã

ts
Iterable.[iterator]

add() ‚Äã

ts
add(key, value): boolean;

Defined in: data-structures/binary-tree/tree-multi-map.ts:804

Append a single value.

Parameters ‚Äã

key ‚Äã

K

value ‚Äã

V

Returns ‚Äã

boolean

Remarks ‚Äã

Time O(log n), Space O(1)

Example ‚Äã

ts
const mm = new TreeMultiMap<number, string>();
      mm.add(1, 'a');
      mm.add(1, 'b');
      mm.add(2, 'c');
console.log(mm.get(1)); // ['a', 'b']

ceiling() ‚Äã

ts
ceiling(key): [K, V[]] | undefined;

Defined in: data-structures/binary-tree/tree-multi-map.ts:1876

Returns the entry with the smallest key >= given key.

Parameters ‚Äã

key ‚Äã

K

Returns ‚Äã

[K, V[]] | undefined

Remarks ‚Äã

Time O(log n), Space O(1)

Example ‚Äã

ts
const mm = new TreeMultiMap<number, string>();
      mm.add(10, 'a');
      mm.add(20, 'b');
      mm.add(30, 'c');
console.log(mm.ceiling(15)?.[0]); // 20

clear() ‚Äã

ts
clear(): void;

Defined in: data-structures/binary-tree/tree-multi-map.ts:340

Removes all entries from the map.

Returns ‚Äã

void

Remarks ‚Äã

Time O(1), Space O(1)

Example ‚Äã

ts
const mm = new TreeMultiMap<number, string>();
      mm.add(1, 'a');
      mm.clear();
console.log(mm.isEmpty()); // true

clone() ‚Äã

ts
clone(): TreeMultiMap<K, V, R>;

Defined in: data-structures/binary-tree/tree-multi-map.ts:3144

Creates a shallow clone of this map.

Returns ‚Äã

TreeMultiMap<K, V, R>

Remarks ‚Äã

Time O(n log n), Space O(n)

Example ‚Äã

ts
const mm = new TreeMultiMap<number, string>();
      mm.add(1, 'a');
      const copy = mm.clone();
      copy.delete(1);
console.log(mm.has(1)); // true

count() ‚Äã

ts
count(key): number;

Defined in: data-structures/binary-tree/tree-multi-map.ts:369

Bucket length for a key (missing => 0).

Parameters ‚Äã

key ‚Äã

K

Returns ‚Äã

number

Remarks ‚Äã

Time O(log n), Space O(1)

Example ‚Äã

ts
const mm = new TreeMultiMap<number, string>();
      mm.add(1, 'a');
      mm.add(1, 'b');
console.log(mm.count(1)); // 2

delete() ‚Äã

ts
delete(key): boolean;

Defined in: data-structures/binary-tree/tree-multi-map.ts:1118

Deletes a key and its entire bucket.

Parameters ‚Äã

key ‚Äã

K

Returns ‚Äã

boolean

Remarks ‚Äã

Time O(log n), Space O(1)

Example ‚Äã

ts
const mm = new TreeMultiMap<number, string>();
      mm.add(1, 'a');
      mm.add(2, 'b');
      mm.delete(1);
console.log(mm.has(1)); // false

deleteValue() ‚Äã

ts
deleteValue(
   key, 
   value, 
   eq?): boolean;

Defined in: data-structures/binary-tree/tree-multi-map.ts:1180

Delete a single occurrence of a value from a key's bucket.

Parameters ‚Äã

key ‚Äã

K

value ‚Äã

V

eq? ‚Äã

(a, b) => boolean

Returns ‚Äã

boolean

Remarks ‚Äã

Time O(log n + m), Space O(1) where m is bucket size

Example ‚Äã

ts
const mm = new TreeMultiMap<number, string>();
      mm.add(1, 'a');
      mm.add(1, 'b');
      mm.deleteValue(1, 'a');
console.log(mm.get(1)); // ['b']

deleteValues() ‚Äã

ts
deleteValues(
   key, 
   value, 
   eq?): number;

Defined in: data-structures/binary-tree/tree-multi-map.ts:1217

Delete all occurrences of a value from a key's bucket.

Parameters ‚Äã

key ‚Äã

K

value ‚Äã

V

eq? ‚Äã

(a, b) => boolean

Returns ‚Äã

number

Remarks ‚Äã

Time O(log n + m), Space O(1) where m is bucket size

Example ‚Äã

ts
const mm = new TreeMultiMap<number, string>();
      mm.add(1, 'a');
      mm.add(1, 'a');
      mm.add(1, 'b');
      const count = mm.deleteValues(1, 'a');
console.log(count); // 2

entriesOf() ‚Äã

ts
entriesOf(key): IterableIterator<[K, V]>;

Defined in: data-structures/binary-tree/tree-multi-map.ts:1505

Iterates over all entries for a specific key.

Parameters ‚Äã

key ‚Äã

K

Returns ‚Äã

IterableIterator<[K, V]>

Remarks ‚Äã

Time O(log n + m), Space O(1) where m is bucket size

Example ‚Äã

ts
const mm = new TreeMultiMap<number, string>();
      mm.add(1, 'a');
      mm.add(1, 'b');
console.log([...mm.entriesOf(1)]); // [[1, 'a'], [1, 'b']]

filter() ‚Äã

ts
filter(predicate): TreeMultiMap<K, V, R>;

Defined in: data-structures/binary-tree/tree-multi-map.ts:2563

Creates a new map with entries that pass the predicate.

Parameters ‚Äã

predicate ‚Äã

(value, key, map) => boolean

Returns ‚Äã

TreeMultiMap<K, V, R>

Remarks ‚Äã

Time O(n), Space O(n)

Example ‚Äã

ts
const mm = new TreeMultiMap<number, string>();
      mm.add(1, 'a');
      mm.add(2, 'b');
      mm.add(3, 'c');
      const filtered = mm.filter((v, k) => k > 1);
console.log([...filtered.keys()]); // [2, 3]

first() ‚Äã

ts
first(): [K, V[]] | undefined;

Defined in: data-structures/binary-tree/tree-multi-map.ts:1626

Returns the entry with the smallest key.

Returns ‚Äã

[K, V[]] | undefined

Remarks ‚Äã

Time O(log n), Space O(1)

Example ‚Äã

ts
const mm = new TreeMultiMap<number, string>();
      mm.add(3, 'c');
      mm.add(1, 'a');
console.log(mm.first()?.[0]); // 1

flatEntries() ‚Äã

ts
flatEntries(): IterableIterator<[K, V]>;

Defined in: data-structures/binary-tree/tree-multi-map.ts:1568

Iterates over all [key, value] pairs (flattened from buckets).

Returns ‚Äã

IterableIterator<[K, V]>

Remarks ‚Äã

Time O(T), Space O(1) where T is totalSize

Example ‚Äã

ts
const mm = new TreeMultiMap<number, string>();
      mm.add(1, 'a');
      mm.add(1, 'b');
      mm.add(2, 'c');
console.log([...mm.flatEntries()]); // [[1, 'a'], [1, 'b'], [2, 'c']]

floor() ‚Äã

ts
floor(key): [K, V[]] | undefined;

Defined in: data-structures/binary-tree/tree-multi-map.ts:2001

Returns the entry with the largest key <= given key.

Parameters ‚Äã

key ‚Äã

K

Returns ‚Äã

[K, V[]] | undefined

Remarks ‚Äã

Time O(log n), Space O(1)

Example ‚Äã

ts
const mm = new TreeMultiMap<number, string>();
      mm.add(10, 'a');
      mm.add(20, 'b');
      mm.add(30, 'c');
console.log(mm.floor(25)?.[0]); // 20

forEach() ‚Äã

ts
forEach(callback): void;

Defined in: data-structures/binary-tree/tree-multi-map.ts:2442

Executes a callback for each entry.

Parameters ‚Äã

callback ‚Äã

(value, key, map) => void

Returns ‚Äã

void

Remarks ‚Äã

Time O(n), Space O(1)

Example ‚Äã

ts
const mm = new TreeMultiMap<number, string>();
      mm.add(1, 'a');
      mm.add(2, 'b');
      const keys: number[] = [];
      mm.forEach((v, k) => keys.push(k));
console.log(keys); // [1, 2]

get() ‚Äã

ts
get(key): V[] | undefined;

Defined in: data-structures/binary-tree/tree-multi-map.ts:691

Live bucket reference (do not auto-delete key if bucket becomes empty via mutation).

Parameters ‚Äã

key ‚Äã

K

Returns ‚Äã

V[] | undefined

Remarks ‚Äã

Time O(log n), Space O(1)

Example ‚Äã

ts
const mm = new TreeMultiMap<number, string>();
      mm.add(1, 'a');
      mm.add(1, 'b');
console.log(mm.get(1)); // ['a', 'b']

has() ‚Äã

ts
has(key): boolean;

Defined in: data-structures/binary-tree/tree-multi-map.ts:546

Whether the map contains the given key.

Parameters ‚Äã

key ‚Äã

K

Returns ‚Äã

boolean

Remarks ‚Äã

Time O(log n), Space O(1)

Example ‚Äã

ts
const mm = new TreeMultiMap<number, string>();
      mm.add(1, 'a');
console.log(mm.has(1)); // true
console.log(mm.has(2)); // false

hasEntry() ‚Äã

ts
hasEntry(
   key, 
   value, 
   eq?): boolean;

Defined in: data-structures/binary-tree/tree-multi-map.ts:1148

Check if a specific value exists in a key's bucket.

Parameters ‚Äã

key ‚Äã

K

value ‚Äã

V

eq? ‚Äã

(a, b) => boolean

Returns ‚Äã

boolean

Remarks ‚Äã

Time O(log n + m), Space O(1) where m is bucket size

Example ‚Äã

ts
const mm = new TreeMultiMap<number, string>();
      mm.add(1, 'a');
console.log(mm.hasEntry(1, 'a')); // true
console.log(mm.hasEntry(1, 'z')); // false

higher() ‚Äã

ts
higher(key): [K, V[]] | undefined;

Defined in: data-structures/binary-tree/tree-multi-map.ts:2101

Returns the entry with the smallest key > given key.

Parameters ‚Äã

key ‚Äã

K

Returns ‚Äã

[K, V[]] | undefined

Remarks ‚Äã

Time O(log n), Space O(1)

Example ‚Äã

ts
const mm = new TreeMultiMap<number, string>();
      mm.add(10, 'a');
      mm.add(20, 'b');
console.log(mm.higher(10)?.[0]); // 20

isEmpty() ‚Äã

ts
isEmpty(): boolean;

Defined in: data-structures/binary-tree/tree-multi-map.ts:223

Whether the map is empty.

Returns ‚Äã

boolean

Remarks ‚Äã

Time O(1), Space O(1)

Example ‚Äã

ts
console.log(new TreeMultiMap().isEmpty()); // true

keys() ‚Äã

ts
keys(): IterableIterator<K>;

Defined in: data-structures/binary-tree/tree-multi-map.ts:1357

Iterates over all keys.

Returns ‚Äã

IterableIterator<K>

Remarks ‚Äã

Time O(n), Space O(1)

Example ‚Äã

ts
const mm = new TreeMultiMap<number, string>();
      mm.add(3, 'c');
      mm.add(1, 'a');
console.log([...mm.keys()]); // [1, 3]

last() ‚Äã

ts
last(): [K, V[]] | undefined;

Defined in: data-structures/binary-tree/tree-multi-map.ts:1683

Returns the entry with the largest key.

Returns ‚Äã

[K, V[]] | undefined

Remarks ‚Äã

Time O(log n), Space O(1)

Example ‚Äã

ts
const mm = new TreeMultiMap<number, string>();
      mm.add(1, 'a');
      mm.add(3, 'c');
console.log(mm.last()?.[0]); // 3

lower() ‚Äã

ts
lower(key): [K, V[]] | undefined;

Defined in: data-structures/binary-tree/tree-multi-map.ts:2201

Returns the entry with the largest key < given key.

Parameters ‚Äã

key ‚Äã

K

Returns ‚Äã

[K, V[]] | undefined

Remarks ‚Äã

Time O(log n), Space O(1)

Example ‚Äã

ts
const mm = new TreeMultiMap<number, string>();
      mm.add(10, 'a');
      mm.add(20, 'b');
console.log(mm.lower(20)?.[0]); // 10

map() ‚Äã

ts
map<V2>(mapper): TreeMultiMap<K, V2, R>;

Defined in: data-structures/binary-tree/tree-multi-map.ts:2684

Creates a new map by transforming each entry.

Type Parameters ‚Äã

V2 ‚Äã

V2

Parameters ‚Äã

mapper ‚Äã

(value, key, map) => [K, V2[]]

Returns ‚Äã

TreeMultiMap<K, V2, R>

Remarks ‚Äã

Time O(n log n), Space O(n)

Example ‚Äã

ts
const mm = new TreeMultiMap<number, string>();
      mm.add(1, 'a');
      const mapped = mm.map((v, k) => [k, v.map(s => s.toUpperCase())] as [number, string[]]);
console.log(mapped.get(1)); // ['A']

pollFirst() ‚Äã

ts
pollFirst(): [K, V[]] | undefined;

Defined in: data-structures/binary-tree/tree-multi-map.ts:1718

Removes and returns the entry with the smallest key.

Returns ‚Äã

[K, V[]] | undefined

Remarks ‚Äã

Time O(log n), Space O(1)

Example ‚Äã

ts
const mm = new TreeMultiMap<number, string>();
      mm.add(2, 'b');
      mm.add(1, 'a');
      const first = mm.pollFirst();
console.log(first?.[0]); // 1
console.log(mm.has(1)); // false

pollLast() ‚Äã

ts
pollLast(): [K, V[]] | undefined;

Defined in: data-structures/binary-tree/tree-multi-map.ts:1752

Removes and returns the entry with the largest key.

Returns ‚Äã

[K, V[]] | undefined

Remarks ‚Äã

Time O(log n), Space O(1)

Example ‚Äã

ts
const mm = new TreeMultiMap<number, string>();
      mm.add(1, 'a');
      mm.add(3, 'c');
      const last = mm.pollLast();
console.log(last?.[0]); // 3

print() ‚Äã

ts
print(): void;

Defined in: data-structures/binary-tree/tree-multi-map.ts:2323

Prints the internal tree structure (for debugging).

Returns ‚Äã

void

Remarks ‚Äã

Time O(n), Space O(n)

Example ‚Äã

ts
const mm = new TreeMultiMap<number, string>();
      mm.add(1, 'a');

rangeSearch() ‚Äã

ts
rangeSearch<C>(range, callback?): ReturnType<C>[];

Defined in: data-structures/binary-tree/tree-multi-map.ts:3023

Searches for entries within a key range.

Type Parameters ‚Äã

C ‚Äã

C extends (node) => unknown

Parameters ‚Äã

range ‚Äã

Range<K> | [K, K]

callback? ‚Äã

C

Returns ‚Äã

ReturnType<C>[]

Remarks ‚Äã

Time O(log n + k), Space O(k) where k is result size

Example ‚Äã

ts
const mm = new TreeMultiMap<number, string>();
      mm.add(10, 'a');
      mm.add(20, 'b');
      mm.add(30, 'c');
      const result = mm.rangeSearch([15, 25]);
console.log(result.length); // 1

reduce() ‚Äã

ts
reduce<U>(callback, initialValue): U;

Defined in: data-structures/binary-tree/tree-multi-map.ts:2808

Reduces all entries to a single value.

Type Parameters ‚Äã

U ‚Äã

U

Parameters ‚Äã

callback ‚Äã

(accumulator, value, key, map) => U

initialValue ‚Äã

U

Returns ‚Äã

U

Remarks ‚Äã

Time O(n), Space O(1)

Example ‚Äã

ts
const mm = new TreeMultiMap<number, number>();
      mm.add(1, 10);
      mm.add(2, 20);
      const sum = mm.reduce((acc, v) => acc + v.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0), 0);
console.log(sum); // 30

set() ‚Äã

Call Signature ‚Äã

ts
set(entry, value?): boolean;

Defined in: data-structures/binary-tree/tree-multi-map.ts:952

Alias for compatibility with existing TreeMultiMap semantics.

Parameters ‚Äã
entry ‚Äã

| K | [K | null | undefined, V[] | undefined] | null | undefined

value? ‚Äã

V

Returns ‚Äã

boolean

Remarks ‚Äã

Time O(log n), Space O(1) for single value; O(log n + m) for bucket append

Example ‚Äã
ts
const mm = new TreeMultiMap<number, string>();
      mm.set(1, 'a');
      mm.set(1, 'b');
console.log(mm.get(1)); // ['a', 'b']

Call Signature ‚Äã

ts
set(key, value): boolean;

Defined in: data-structures/binary-tree/tree-multi-map.ts:953

Alias for compatibility with existing TreeMultiMap semantics.

Parameters ‚Äã
key ‚Äã

K

value ‚Äã

V

Returns ‚Äã

boolean

Remarks ‚Äã

Time O(log n), Space O(1) for single value; O(log n + m) for bucket append

Example ‚Äã
ts
const mm = new TreeMultiMap<number, string>();
      mm.set(1, 'a');
      mm.set(1, 'b');
console.log(mm.get(1)); // ['a', 'b']

setMany() ‚Äã

ts
setMany(keysNodesEntriesOrRaws): boolean[];

Defined in: data-structures/binary-tree/tree-multi-map.ts:2920

Sets multiple entries at once.

Parameters ‚Äã

keysNodesEntriesOrRaws ‚Äã

Iterable<K | [K | null | undefined, V[] | undefined]>

Returns ‚Äã

boolean[]

Remarks ‚Äã

Time O(m log n), Space O(m) where m is input size

Example ‚Äã

ts
const mm = new TreeMultiMap<number, string>();
      mm.setMany([[1, ['a']], [2, ['b']]]);
console.log(mm.size); // 2

values() ‚Äã

ts
values(): IterableIterator<V[]>;

Defined in: data-structures/binary-tree/tree-multi-map.ts:1474

Iterates over all buckets.

Returns ‚Äã

IterableIterator<V[]>

Remarks ‚Äã

Time O(n), Space O(1)

Example ‚Äã

ts
const mm = new TreeMultiMap<number, string>();
      mm.add(1, 'a');
      mm.add(1, 'b');
console.log([...mm.values()]); // [['a', 'b']]

valuesOf() ‚Äã

ts
valuesOf(key): IterableIterator<V>;

Defined in: data-structures/binary-tree/tree-multi-map.ts:1536

Iterates over all values for a specific key.

Parameters ‚Äã

key ‚Äã

K

Returns ‚Äã

IterableIterator<V>

Remarks ‚Äã

Time O(log n + m), Space O(1) where m is bucket size

Example ‚Äã

ts
const mm = new TreeMultiMap<number, string>();
      mm.add(1, 'a');
      mm.add(1, 'b');
console.log([...mm.valuesOf(1)]); // ['a', 'b']
